steps.title: Fraction = 0 when numerator = 0 (and denominator ≠ 0)
steps.content: Set $(x-7)(x-8) = 0$ → solutions $x = 7$ and $x = 8$. Check denominator: $7-3 = 4 \neq 0$ and $8-3 = 5 \neq 0$, so both are valid.

steps.title: Sum the roots directly
steps.content: Sum $= 7 + 8 = 15$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
